group_1.textLeft: Laugh all you want.
However, even I have my own reasons for coming@to speak with the Neo-Magius.

group_1.textRight: It's the same for us. We won't laugh.
It's reassuring to see you here, actually...

group_1.textLeft: *Chuckle* Seems we'll all get along swimmingly.
Now, let's wrap up the greetings and get started,@shall we?

group_1.textRight: (Is it really only the two of them...?@They're somewhat defenseless...)
Hey, are we honestly just gonna talk right now?
I mean, we're still enemies, so I'm a little on edge~.
How can we be sure you're not gonna gun us down@if we step out of line?

group_1.textLeft: Think about it—@we're sitting ducks.
You can take our Soul Gems hostage if you'd like,
but that's a temporary measure in the end.
Since the Neo-Magius is outnumbered@by the other groups,
we're done for if we can't recruit you girls.

group_1.textRight: Hm, so you're walking a tightrope across a ravine.

group_1.textLeft: Essentially, yes.
That's why I'd like to ask you to hear us out@and come to a decision.
...To start, the Neo-Magius aims to spread@Magical Girl supremacy,
thereby making ourselves superior to mankind.

group_1.textRight: I know that, but can you explain why?

group_1.textLeft: Magical Girls have been the driving force throughout@human history, all the way to the present.
We are better than ordinary humans.

group_1.textRight: And in the process of rising above humanity,@we'll achieve our own goals...?

group_1.textLeft: Of course, absolutely!
If we spread Magical Girl supremacy,@everyone's hopes will be fulfilled!

group_1.narration: "Magical Girls are like gods that transcend mankind.@That's why Lady San can become the god@of the Hikarizuka Fire Festival!"
"If I become better than other people,@I won't have to be nervous@around them anymore.@And then I won't have to worry@about going berserk and@accidentally hurting anyone!"
"No one will be able to make fun of Azumi."
"And even Miyabi will finally be free@from all the outside pressures on her,@and finally be able to get@recognition for her work."

group_1.textLeft: To summarize, through the process and results@of spreading Magical Girl supremacy,
each of our assorted goals can be realized.
Anything is possible if we can climb to the apex@of Magical Girls.
Above the metaphorical ceiling...
A place none could ever reach, no matter how high@they flew.
Beyond the realm of humans, standing above@even other Magical Girls...
We will become gods over all.
